vms.anotacao: vSphere Cluster Service VM is deployed from an OVA with a minimal installed profile of PhotonOS. vSphere Cluster Service manages the resources, power state and availability of these VMs. vSphere Cluster Service VMs are required for maintaining the health and availability of vSphere Cluster Service.
